name: openrecord
description: Read and manage your MyChart health data through Claude.
long_description: Connects Claude Desktop to Epic MyChart patient portals. Ask Claude to fetch your medications, lab results, imaging, messages, billing, and more — or to send a message to your care team, request a refill, or update emergency contacts. Auth is conversational: tell Claude to set up your account and a guided flow walks you through picking your MyChart, signing in, completing 2FA, and registering a passkey for future zero-prompt logins.

tools.name: list_accounts
tools.description: List configured MyChart accounts and their connection status. Returns the hostname for each — pass that as `account` to any other tool.

tools.name: search_mycharts
tools.description: Search the directory of known MyChart instances by name.

tools.name: get_setup_widget
tools.description: Display an interactive widget for connecting a MyChart account. Use this if the user wants a GUI instead of chat-based setup.

tools.name: setup_account
tools.description: Attempt to log into MyChart with hostname + username + password. May return need_2fa.

tools.name: complete_2fa
tools.description: Finish a setup_account flow that returned need_2fa.

tools.name: register_passkey
tools.description: Register a passkey on an already-connected account so future logins skip the password and 2FA.

tools.name: disconnect_account
tools.description: Forget a saved MyChart account (deletes local credentials, passkey, and session).
